prompt_text:
### Demographics: 51-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 6 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after elevated fasting glucose on routine screening
Current symptoms: Postprandial fatigue and thirst noted; no DKA/HHS signs; no recent hypoglycemia; Worsening edema and dyspnea over the last 3 months.

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 4 (15-29)
Heart failure: HFmrEF (NYHA Class II)
ASCVD: History of myocardial infarction
Body mass index category: Obese Class II
Diabetic neuropathy
Diabetic Peripheral Neuropathy
Frailty with Mobility Impairment
Recurrent Complicated Urinary Tract Infections
Appendicitis (status post appendectomy)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 4 (15-29); HF: HFmrEF (NYHA Class II); ASCVD: History of myocardial infarction; MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Obese Class II
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (father)
- Social history: Former smoker (quit 5 years ago; 15 cigarettes/day for 15 years; ~11.2 pack-years); Alcohol 5-6 drinks/week (1-2 per sitting)

### Medication information
- Current medications: Dulaglutide 1.5mg once weekly; Lobeglitazone 0.5mg once daily; Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Lisinopril (10 mg daily), Ciprofloxacin (500 mg twice daily for 7 days)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 72.8 kg; Height 153.7 cm; BMI 30.8 kg/m²; Blood pressure 122/79 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 8.8%; 9 months ago 8.4%; 6 months ago 7.9%; 3 months ago 7.4%; current 7.2%), FPG (12 months ago 223mg/dL; 9 months ago 191mg/dL; 6 months ago 162mg/dL; 3 months ago 191mg/dL; current 172mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 71.2kg; 9 months ago 72.7kg; 6 months ago 69.7kg; 3 months ago 70.3kg; current 72.8kg), Height (12 months ago 153.7cm; 9 months ago 153.7cm; 6 months ago 153.7cm; 3 months ago 153.7cm; current 153.7cm), BMI (12 months ago 30.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 31.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 30.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 30.0kg/m²; current 30.8kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 120mmHg; 9 months ago 120mmHg; 6 months ago 121mmHg; 3 months ago 120mmHg; current 122mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 80mmHg; 9 months ago 79mmHg; 6 months ago 78mmHg; 3 months ago 78mmHg; current 79mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 16U/L; 9 months ago 15U/L; 6 months ago 17U/L; 3 months ago 23U/L; current 19U/L), AST (12 months ago 28U/L; 9 months ago 26U/L; 6 months ago 26U/L; 3 months ago 20U/L; current 24U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.3mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.4mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.3mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.4mg/dL; current 0.4mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 23mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 23mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 19mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 20mL/min/1.73m²; current 18mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 92mg/g; 9 months ago 118mg/g; 6 months ago 111mg/g; 3 months ago 105mg/g; current 111mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 95mg/dL; 9 months ago 91mg/dL; 6 months ago 96mg/dL; 3 months ago 95mg/dL; current 92mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 45mg/dL; 9 months ago 45mg/dL; 6 months ago 48mg/dL; 3 months ago 45mg/dL; current 47mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 116mg/dL; 9 months ago 113mg/dL; 6 months ago 115mg/dL; 3 months ago 135mg/dL; current 123mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 11.0g/dL; 9 months ago 10.2g/dL; 6 months ago 10.9g/dL; 3 months ago 11.0g/dL; current 10.0g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
